intro: Rhacodiscus moricandianus, also known as the Korean ginseng or Asian ginseng, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Araliaceae, native to East Asia and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rhacodiscus moricandianus include its ability to enhance cognitive function, improve immune system, and reduce stress, among others. The bioactive constituents of this plant include ginsenosides, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Rhacodiscus moricandianus is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as ginseng tea, ginseng extract, and ginseng capsules, which are available in various forms and used for a range of health purposes.
